title: Waxable Item Frames
description:
Item frames can be locked (waxed) using honeycombs.

Item frames can then be unlocked with an axe.
body:
# Waxable Item Frames

Item frames can be locked (waxed) using honeycombs.

Item frames can then be unlocked with an axe.

# Compatibility

**Confirmed Works With**
- [Invis Item Frame](https://modrinth.com/datapack/invis-item-frame)
